---
title: "Skills"
---

::: {.page-title}
Technical, analytical, and professional skills developed through MSc coursework, engineering study, operations support, certifications, and applied portfolio projects.
:::

::: {.section}
::: {.skills-grid}
::: {.skill-card}
### Business Analysis

Requirements understanding, process support, stakeholder communication, documentation, problem investigation, and decision-support thinking.
:::

::: {.skill-card}
### Data Analysis

Data cleaning, preparation, interpretation, reporting, KPI tracking, dashboard thinking, and insight generation for business contexts.
:::

::: {.skill-card}
### Python, SQL & R

Notebook-based analysis, querying, joining, filtering, transformation, visualisation, and structured analytical workflows.
:::

::: {.skill-card}
### BI & Visualisation

Power BI, Tableau, Excel, data storytelling, presentation of insights, and business-facing communication.
:::

::: {.skill-card}
### Forecasting & ML

Time-series analysis, LSTM, GRU, Random Forest, feature engineering, model comparison, and evaluation workflows.
:::

::: {.skill-card}
### Generative AI

Prompt engineering, large language model concepts, ChatGPT applications, NLP, ethical AI, data security, and responsible data use.
:::
:::
:::
